**Persona:**

Kai Malosi, a 39-year-old Pacific Islander, has been making his home in New York City for the past decade. Having grown up in the vibrant community of Muradnagar, Kai carries the warmth and traditions of his heritage into his urban lifestyle. With a deep love for the bustling city life, he has found joy in blending his cultural background with the diverse influences he encounters daily. Professionally, Kai is a graphic designer, and his work often reflects the rich artistic traditions of his Pacific Islander roots. Outside of work, he enjoys exploring NYC’s museums and art galleries, finding inspiration in the city’s dynamic art scene.
